# Temple Mother Earth

> A 508(c)(1)(A) sacred ceremony church in Washington, DC offering Earth Medicine ceremony, spiritual education, and congregational community. Established 2020.

Temple Mother Earth is a sacred sanctuary holding ceremony in sincere religious practice under the Religious Freedom Restoration Act (RFRA). Ceremonies are sacramental and not medical treatment. Contact: askus@templemotherearth.org

## Pages

- [About](/about): Mission, philosophy, and 508(c)(1)(A) church status.
- [Membership](/membership): Tiered congregational pathway (Welcome, Belong, Train, Prepare, Embody).
- [Sacred Series](/sacred-series): Monthly 7-day cycle of ceremonies and themes.
- [Community Care](/community-care): Sacred reciprocity model and intensive offerings.
- [Veterans Transformation Program](/veterans-transformation-program): Dedicated path for veterans.
- [Journal](/journal): Transmissions and writings from the sanctuary.
- [Contact](/contact): Inquiries via centralized GHL form.

## Ceremonies

- [Kambo Purification](/kambo): Sacred frog sacrament for purification.
- [Hapé Ceremony](/hape): Sacred tobacco inhalation for grounding and clarity.
- [Cacao Ceremony](/cacao): Heart-opening ceremonial cacao.
- [Sacred Tea Ceremony](/sacred-tea): Singular sacred tea experience.
- [Sacred Fungi · Level 5](/level5): Advanced initiation ceremony.
- [Inner Alchemy Spa](/spa): Held at Spa World, body as temple practice.
- [Sacred Yin Yoga](/yin-yoga): The Softening (women) and Art of Surrender (virtual).
- [Sacred Art Expo](/art-expo): Standalone luxury art platform.
- [Frequency · Fungi · Flow](/frequency-fungi-flow): Sound, sacrament, and movement.
- [Sacred Tea House](/tea-house): Tea ceremony gatherings.
- [Community Potluck](/potluck): Shared meals in community.
- [Men's Circle](/mens-circle) and [Women's Circle](/womens-circle): Gender-held community circles.
- [Kambo for Women](/kambo-women): Women-only purification.

## Immersions

- [Sayulita, Mexico](/immersions/sayulita): Beachfront immersion.
- [Costa Rica](/immersions/costa-rica): Jungle sanctuary.
- [Peru](/immersions/peru): Amazonian plant sanctuary.
- [Panama](/immersions/panama): Sacred immersion.
- [Egypt](/immersions/egypt): Kemetic pilgrimage.
- [Private Ceremonies](/private-ceremonies): One-on-one offerings.
- [Traveling Ceremonies](/traveling-ceremonies): Mobile ceremony at your location.
- [Retreats Inquiry](/retreats-inquiry): Booking inquiries.

## Teachings & Resources

- [Kemetic Teachings](/kemetic-teachings): Body as Temple philosophy.
- [Earth Kingdoms](/earth-kingdoms): Mineral, plant, fungi, animal, and human kingdoms.
- [Sacred Blueprint](/sacred-blueprint): Human Design integration.
- [Plant Medicine Glossary](/plant-medicine-glossary): RFRA-compliant glossary of sacred plants.
- [Preparation Protocols](/preparation): 7-day physical and spiritual preparation.
- [Code of Conduct](/conduct): Sanctuary conduct expectations.
- [RFRA Compliance](/rfra-compliance): First Amendment protections and legal framework.
- [Privacy Policy](/privacy-policy): Data and privacy practices.

## Ways to Serve

- [Volunteer](/volunteer): Energy exchange and volunteer credits.
- [Join as Facilitator](/join-facilitator): Apply to facilitate.
- [Sponsor](/sponsor): Sponsor ceremony or veterans.
- [Donate](/donate): Stewardship and donations.

## Optional

- [Ceremony Intake](/ceremony-intake): Required multi-step intake before ceremony.
